fields.name: Capacity Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of capacity that the absence entry affects.
Click the drop-down button to select Machine Center or Work Center.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the machine center or work center that you selected in the Capacity Type field.
The program assigns the absence entry to only one machine center or work center.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date associated with this absence entry.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting time of the absence entry.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending time of the absence entry.

fields.name: Work Center No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work center number if the absence entry refers to a work center. If this entry is assigned to a machine center and this machine center is assigned to a work center, then the number of the work center is shown here.

fields.name: Work Center Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work center group if the work center or the machine center was assigned to a work center group.

fields.name: Capacity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity of the absence entry, which was planned for this work center or machine center.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the absence entry, for example, holiday or vacation"

fields.name: Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calendar has been updated with this absence entry.
